title: 3 Facts About the Paper Folding Myth

segments.text: You can only fold a piece of paper seven times.
But there's a twist to this story.
The thickness and size matter a lot.
With a giant sheet, you could fold it thousands!
So, is the seven-fold limit a myth?
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: The paper folding limit may surprise you! Follow for daily facts! 🤯
